case_title: GARMA RESURRECCION G. VS DIOQUINO DOMINISCIANA

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEE S AND COSTS FILED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARMA RESURRECCION G. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIOQUINO DOMINISCIANA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS FIL ED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY GARMA RESURRECCION G. AS TO DEFENDANT DIOQUINO DOMINISCIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-1995 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO DIOQUINO DOMINISCIANA RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
